# Fenix Nordic Solutions

> Digital delivery for ambitious businesses. Open source technology, AI-assisted workflows, and acceptance criteria agreed before work begins. Based in Skanderborg, Denmark.

## About

Fenix Nordic Solutions is a digital consultancy based in Skanderborg, Denmark. The company delivers web development, DevOps, and infrastructure services using open-source technology. Every project starts with agreed acceptance criteria before work begins, ensuring transparent delivery and predictable outcomes.

## Services

- Web development (Drupal, WordPress, Nuxt/Vue, PHP, Node.js)
- DevOps and infrastructure (Docker, Linux, CI/CD, self-hosted servers)
- AI-assisted development workflows
- Technical consulting and architecture

## Approach

- Open-source first: no vendor lock-in
- Acceptance criteria agreed upfront
- AI-assisted workflows for efficiency
- Transparent pricing and delivery

## Location

Skanderborg, Denmark

## Contact

- Website: https://fenixnordic.solutions
- Email: Available via website contact form
